tasks.label: uv-permission-repair-sync
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; $venv=(Resolve-Path .venv).Path; Get-Process python,pythonw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Path -and $_.Path -like "$venv*" } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force }; icacls .venv /remove:d Everyone /T /C | Out-File -FilePath .uv_acl_fix.log -Encoding utf8; attrib -R .venv /S /D; uv sync *> .uv_sync.log

tasks.label: uv-permission-repair-sync
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; $venv=(Resolve-Path .venv).Path; Get-Process python,pythonw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Path -and $_.Path -like "$venv*" } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force }; icacls .venv /remove:d Everyone /T /C | Out-File -FilePath .uv_acl_fix.log -Encoding utf8; attrib -R .venv /S /D; uv sync *> .uv_sync.log

tasks.label: uv-permission-repair-sync-2
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; $venv=(Resolve-Path .venv).Path; Get-Process python,pythonw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Path -and $_.Path -like "$($venv)*" } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force }; icacls .venv /remove:d Everyone /T /C | Out-File -FilePath .uv_acl_fix.log -Encoding utf8; attrib -R .venv /S /D; uv sync *> .uv_sync.log

tasks.label: uv-permission-repair-sync-3
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; $venv=(Resolve-Path .venv).Path; Get-Process python,pythonw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Path -and $_.Path.StartsWith($venv, [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase) } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force }; icacls .venv /remove:d Everyone /T /C | Out-File -FilePath .uv_acl_fix.log -Encoding utf8; attrib -R .venv /S /D; uv sync *> .uv_sync.log

tasks.label: recreate-venv-with-uv
tasks.command: if (Test-Path .venv) { icacls .venv /remove:d Everyone /T /C | Out-Null; attrib -R .venv /S /D; Remove-Item .venv -Recurse -Force }; uv sync

tasks.label: force-reset-delete-venv
tasks.command: if (Test-Path .venv) { takeown /f .venv /r /d y | Out-Null; icacls .venv /reset /T /C | Out-Null; icacls .venv /remove:d Everyone /T /C | Out-Null; attrib -R .venv /S /D; Remove-Item .venv -Recurse -Force }; Write-Output "venv_removed=$(!(Test-Path .venv))"

tasks.label: force-rmdir-venv
tasks.command: if (Test-Path .venv) { takeown /f .venv /r /d y | Out-Null; icacls .venv /reset /T /C | Out-Null; icacls .venv /remove:d Everyone /T /C | Out-Null; attrib -R .venv /S /D; cmd /c rmdir /s /q .venv }; Write-Output "venv_exists=$((Test-Path .venv))"
